stories.title: Tour: Carapaz belohnt sich mit Sieg bei Bergankunft in Orcières-Merlette
stories.summary: Richard Carapaz hat die zweite Bergankunft der Tour de France in den Alpen gewonnen. Der Ecuadorianer belohnte sich damit in Orcières-Merlette für seine vielen Attacken. Unzählige Male war der 33-Jährige bei dieser Tour in die Offensive gegangen, auch die 18. Etappe prägte er von Anfang an mit. Von Ralf Schloßmacher Auf dem sieben Kilometer langen Schlussanstieg hatte Carapaz die erste Attacke aus einer sechsköpfigen Ausreißergruppe gesetzt. Erst im zweiten Versuch 3,4 Kilometer vor dem Ziel konnte er sich dann absetzen und feierte als Solist nach 2024 seinen zweiten Etappensieg bei der Tour. 45 Sekunden dahinter kamen Mauro Schmid als Zweiter und Matteo Jorgenson als Dritter ins Ziel.

stories.title: LIVE Tour de France, la 18ª tappa: Caruso e Frigo nel gruppo in fuga. Pogacar con 4'45" di ritardo
stories.summary: Carapaz vince la tappa con un grande strappo nel finale. Gruppetto staccato di oltre 40", il gruppo con i migliori accusa un ritardo di 4'36" A 3 km dal traguardo, Carapaz stacca i compagni di fuga di 16", in aumento. Potrebbe aver dato lo scrollone decisivo Inizia la salita finale di Orcières-Merlette. Pogacar e gli altri big a 5'45" dai primi. Out McNulty A 13 km dall'arrivo, sei in testa. Maglia gialla a 6'20". Si ritira McNulty, gregario importante per Pogacar. Tra 2 km inizia la salita finale Jorgenson, Carapaz, Paret-Peintre, Schmid, Johannessen e Garcia Pierna compongono la testa della corsa.

stories.title: Kijk hier live naar de ontknoping van de 18e etappe in de Tour de France
stories.summary: NOS Wielrennen vandaag, 12:20 Kijk hier live naar de achttiende etappe van de Tour de France. Een bergrit over 185 km van Voiron naar Orcières-Merlette. Het commentaar is van Andries Lamain en Michael Boogerd. Beklimmingen - afstand tot aan de finish 149 km Côte d'Engins - 1ste cat. 11,4 km à 5,4% 93 km Côte de Monteynard - 2de cat. 9,7 km à 5,0% 72 km Côte des Terrasses - 3de cat. 3,4 km à 6,6% 56 km Corps - sprint 19 km Côte de Saint-Léger-les-Mélezes - 3de cat. 2,5 km à 6,9% 0 km Orcieres-Merlette - 1ste cat. 7,1 km à 6,7% Beluister dagelijks de NOS Wielerpodcast (opent in nieuw venster) . Stef Clement en Andries Lamain praten je in twintig minuten bij over de etappe van vandaag en morgen.

stories.title: ESPN cuts ties with NFL analyst Ryan Clark, wider layoffs expected Tuesday: Sources - The Athletic
stories.summary: ESPN has cut ties with NFL analyst Ryan Clark, sources briefed on the move told The Athletic . Clark was on ESPN’s “NFL Live” on Monday. He was informed of the decision during the show, said the sources, speaking on the condition of anonymity to discuss a sensitive matter. Clark did not finish the program. Sources at ESPN say the reason they told Clark during the show was due to media inquiries into his departure and a fear that the news would leak out before they could inform him. Since after the Super Bowl in February, sources had told The Athletic that Clark’s job could be in jeopardy. Last week, The Athletic learned that Clark was likely to be let go.

stories.title: Nuove banconote in euro, la Bce svela i primi disegni: da Leonardo a Maria Callas, ecco come cambierà il contante
stories.summary: Per la prima volta dalla nascita dell'euro, i cittadini europei possono scegliere il volto delle future banconote. La Banca centrale europea ha presentato oggi i 10 progetti finalisti della nuova serie dell'euro e ha aperto una consultazione pubblica (qui votare) che resterà aperta fino al 21 settembre. Saranno i cittadini, insieme agli esperti e al Consiglio direttivo della Bce, a contribuire alla scelta della nuova veste grafica della moneta unica, la prima completamente ridisegnata qdalla sua introduzione nel 2002. «Le banconote in euro sono più di un mezzo di pagamento: sono una delle espressioni più tangibili dell'Europa.

stories.title: Tour de France 2026: les regrets de Lavenu pour Paul Seixas après son éviction jugée "violente, improbable, injuste" de Decathlon-CMA CGM
stories.summary: Brillant pour son premier Tour de France à seulement 19 ans, Paul Seixas reste en lice pour décrocher un fantastique podium sur l’édition 2026 de la Grande Boucle. À seulement 20 secondes d’Isaac Del Toro, le leader de l’équipe Decathlon-CMA CGM possède un vrai coup à jouer sur les dernières étapes de la course. Ancien patron emblématique de la formation tricolore, Vincent Lavenu s’est enthousiasmé pour les débuts du coureur qu’il a déniché chez les jeunes. "Aujourd’hui, il est quatrième à 20 secondes du podium de Del Toro.

stories.title: Ibai Llanos: "La Velada que me queda por hacer es en Bilbao saliendo yo a boxear delante de mi familia"
stories.summary: This Saturday, July 25, the sixth edition of Ibai Llanos' Velada del Año will take place at the Estadio La Cartuja in Sevilla, featuring boxing, music, and digital entertainment. With temperatures expected to drop to around 33 degrees Celsius, thousands are anticipated to attend the event, which begins at 7 PM. Following this edition, Llanos expressed his desire to host a future event in Bilbao, where he hopes to box in front of his family.

stories.title: Direct vidéo - Tour de France 2026, 18e étape : 6 hommes en tête dont Jorgenson, Johannessen et Carapaz
stories.summary: Dans quel état d’esprit les coureurs du classement général aborderont-ils cette 18e étape ? Il est évident qu’ils ne pourront pas se cacher dans l’ascension finale vers Orcières-Merlette. Mais avant deux terribles étapes, avec une double arrivée à l’Alpe d’Huez, oseront-ils jeter toutes leurs forces dans la bataille ce jeudi ? Réponse dès 12h avec notre émission d’avant Tour, avant le début du direct de l’étape dès 12h50.

stories.title: Gary Lineker among millionaires asking Andy Burnham to tax them more
stories.summary: Millionaires including former footballer Gary Lineker and music producer Brian Eno have written to new prime minister Andy Burnham asking to be taxed more. In an open letter, 120 well-off Britons told Burnham: "We can afford it. We're not talking about higher taxes on those who get up and go to work for their income every day, but on the very richest whose income is derived from the wealth they hold." Organised by Patriotic Millionaires, the letter said it would lead to a more equal society, and urged a "devolution of wealth and power from the very richest". People can already give money or stocks voluntarily to the Treasury using a donation facility.

stories.title: Vasto, incidente mortale sulla Statale 16
stories.summary: Condividi Un morto ed un ferito. E’ questo il grave bilancio dell’incidente stradale che si è verificato nel pomeriggio di oggi, giovedì 23 luglio, sulla Statale 16, subito dopo l’uscita di Via Del Porto. Tremendo l’impatto che ha coinvolto un camion ed una Peugeot 3008. Al momento non si conoscono le cause. Sul posto i sanitari del 118, i vigili del fuoco di Vasto e le forze dell’ordine. Al momento la strada è chiusa al traffico in entrambe le direzioni. Illeso il conducente del camion. Non andata così, invece, alle due persone che erano in auto. Una è morta, l’altra è gravemente ferita.

stories.title: Un nouveau cas rare de cancer se transmet comme un parasite chez des poissons d’eau douce
stories.summary: Un cancer contagieux rare a été découvert chez des poissons-chats dans le lac Memphrémagog, à la frontière entre les États-Unis et le Québec. La maladie, identifiée en 2012, touche environ un tiers des barbottes brunes et se transmet directement entre individus. Les scientifiques étudient désormais son impact sur les populations pour évaluer les risques écologiques.

stories.title: Berlin: CSD in Berlin mit Auftritten von Ikkimel und Sarah Connor
stories.summary: Beim Berliner Christopher Street Days (CSD) treten zwei prominente Sängerinnen auf. Wie die CSD-Veranstalter am Donnerstag bekannt machten, wird für Freitag Ikkimel erwartet, für Samstag Sarah Connor. Ikkimel sei "mit ihren Songs, ihrer Haltung und ihrer Stimme (...) aus der queeren Szene nicht mehr wegzudenken", hieß es in einem Instagram-Post des CSD. "Wir freuen uns riesig, dass sie uns beim Demokratieabend am Brandenburger Tor unterstützt." Der genaue Auftrittszeitpunkt wurde nicht mitgeteilt. Bei der Abschlusskundgebung des CSD tritt zudem am Samstag Sängerin Sarah Connor auf.

stories.title: Tour de France 2026 stage 18 predictions, tips and odds: Richard Carapaz can claim glory on first Alpine stage
stories.summary: Click here to add us to your Google preferred sources or find out more here Three big days in the Alps start here with a summit finish at Orcieres-Merlette at the end of a 185.2km route that shouldn't be as taxing as the roads to Alpe d'Huez on Friday and Saturday. Tadej Pogacar has a lead of 4min 32sec over Remco Evenepoel and, barring disaster, is poised to join the select group of five-time Tour winners and eat further into Mark Cavendish's record of stage wins. The route kicks up early with the category one Cote d'Engins and a breakaway of around 20 riders is likely to build a good lead as the stage progresses over three more lower-category climbs before the 7.1km ascent to the finish.

stories.title: 26_0558 La Ertzaintza detiene en Mungia a tres hombres que acababan de robar en una vivienda de Bakio
stories.summary: 26_0558 La Ertzaintza detiene en Mungia a tres hombres que acababan de robar en una vivienda de Bakio Servicio de prensa 22-07-2026 Agentes de la Ertzaintza detuvieron el lunes en Mungia a tres ladrones en posesión de joyas, que acababan de robar en un domicilio del municipio de Bakio. Los arrestados tienen antecedentes policiales por este tipo de delitos y la autoridad judicial ha decretado su ingreso en prisión. Fotos Patrullas de la Ertzain-etxea de Gernika interceptaron el lunes un vehículo de alta gama, sobre las 19:00 horas, en un control preventivo que realizaban en la carretera BI-2120, en el término municipal de Mungia.

stories.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved im Test: Benchmarks, DLSS/FSR-Analysen, Latenz-Messungen + mehr
stories.summary: Wie gut ist die Technik der PC-Version von Halo: Campaign Evolved? Der Test mit Benchmarks sowie Analysen zu DLSS, FSR und Raytracing verrät es. Im Fokus: Grafikkarten-Benchmarks mit Nvidia GeForce, AMD Radeon und Intel Arc. Zudem wird das Upsampling in Form von DLSS und FSR genauer analysiert. Latenzmessungen gibt es ebenfalls. Halo: Campaign Evolved: Die Technik der PC-Version Microsofts beliebte Ego-Shooter-Serie Halo ist erstmals 2001 erschienen. Halo war das Zugpferd der damals ersten Xbox. Genau 25 Jahre später folgt unter dem Namen „Halo: Campaign Evolved“ das Remake des ersten Teils.

stories.title: Test de Halo Campaign Evolved : le remake inutile d’un chef-d’œuvre intemporel
stories.summary: Un retour aux sources pour impulser la «réinitialisation» de la marque Xbox. Moins d’un mois après l’annonce de licenciements massifs au sein de ses studios de jeux vidéo, Microsoft commercialise à partir du 28 juillet (ou de ce 23 juillet pour les acheteurs de l’édition premium) Halo Campaign Evolved, réédition attendue de son jeu de tir culte Halo Combat Evolved, sorti en 2001 et déjà remastérisé en 2011. Avec ce remake, Xbox compte bien relancer sa saga légendaire (plus de 80 millions d’unités vendues sur 12 épisodes) et faire oublier son dernier opus, le décrié Halo Infinite (2021). Pas sûr toutefois que Xbox s’en sorte avec les honneurs en termes de contenu et de prix.

stories.title: Un feu brûle 8 000 m2 de végétation dans la nuit à Entraigues-sur-la-Sorgue
stories.summary: Un incendie a ravagé 8 000 mètres carrés de végétation à Entraigues-sur-la-Sorgue dans la nuit du 21 juillet, sans faire de blessés ni de dégâts matériels. Environ 27 pompiers ont combattu le feu, qui a été alimenté par un vent modéré, et les efforts se sont poursuivis jusqu'à ce qu'il soit maîtrisé. Les autorités continuent de surveiller la situation pour prévenir tout risque de reprise.

stories.title: Quel depistaggio di Ranucci: indicò la Colosimo al pm
stories.summary: Cosa c’entra Chiara Colosimo, la presidente della Commissione bicamerale antimafia, con l’attentato subito da Sigfrido Ranucci nell’ottobre dello scorso anno? Si potrebbe pensare all’audizione del conduttore nella commissione che lei presiede. E invece no, perché Mr Report ha fatto il nome della Colosimo in un’occasione delicatissima: il 17 ottobre 2025, esattamente il giorno dopo l’azione dinamitarda che lo vedeva bersaglio. Erano le ore 15,24 quando, presso gli uffici della procura della Repubblica di Roma, Ranucci sedeva dinanzi al Procuratore Francesco Lo Voi e al pubblico ministero, titolare dell’indagine, Carlo Villani, oggi procuratore a Velletri.

stories.title: Commonwealth Games: Katerina Johnson-Thompson out injured - why do athletes keep withdrawing?
stories.summary: Olympic heptathlon champion Katarina Johnson-Thompson has pulled out of the Commonwealth Games in Glasgow due to injury. England’s relay teams have also been reshuffled with Dina Asher-Smith, Matt Hudson-Smith and Daryll Neita replaced. The track and field events start Monday as England adds four more athletes to its squad.

stories.title: More than 80,700 sign petition calling for World Cup final replay
stories.summary: Argentina's defeat to Spain in the 2026 World Cup final, played on Sunday 19 July at New Jersey's MetLife Stadium, has sparked a wave of protests that continues several days after the final whistle.Fan Gisela Sánchez launched a petition on Change.org calling on FIFA to replay the match, which was decided by a Ferran Torres goal in extra time.

stories.title: Wildfires and record dry conditions triggers drought in parts of Wales
stories.summary: Gail Davies-Walsh, chief executive of Afonydd Cymru, said the country's waterways were already under strain due to pollution. "The lack of rainfall and decline in river flows is really starting to exacerbate water quality," she said. "We've already had a couple of rivers that have dried up and we're getting reports through of fish that have been killed because of a lack of water." High river temperatures were also leading to concerns for the survival of aquatic life, she added, with water temperatures as high as 28C recorded in the Wye and Usk.

stories.title: Peter Phillips and Harriet Sperling are joined by her teenage daughter, Georgina, to support Prince William at a charity polo day
stories.summary: From their first meeting to their wedding day, family has been at the heart of Peter Phillips and Harriet Sperling's royal romance. So it is of no surprise their three daughters continue to play such an important part in their lives now that they're married. Last week, Harriet and Peter were joined by her daughter, Georgina, as they made a low-key appearance at the DMMI Royal Charity Polo Cup at Guards Polo Club, Windsor.

stories.title: The roaring 20s: how the current decade revolutionised cinema
stories.summary: Cinema in the 2020s has faced unprecedented challenges from streaming and the pandemic, yet it has also seen remarkable innovation. Filmmakers have embraced new technologies and collaborations with platforms like YouTube to create experiences impossible just a decade ago. The decade’s defining shift may be how cinema has evolved into an interactive dialogue with digital audiences.

stories.title: Newcastle, Liverpool planning Keegan tribute at season opener
stories.summary: Newcastle United will honor Kevin Keegan with black armbands and a minute’s silence before their season-opening friendlies starting this Saturday. His number seven shirt will be celebrated in a tribute during matches on August 15 and 16. The club will also consult his family on a permanent memorial following his passing at age 72.

stories.title: Burnham says 20% business rates cut for English pubs 'a first step'
stories.summary: Andy Burnham announced a 20% cut to business rates for English pubs, social clubs and live music venues from April, saving firms around £1,100 each. The £100m plan, funded by reviewing tax relief on less community-focused businesses, will benefit nearly 32,000 venues. Details on eligibility and further support will be outlined at the Chancellor’s autumn Budget.

stories.title: Zelensky’s Dizzying U-Turn Is the Latest Zigzag in a Presidency Full of Them
stories.summary: President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine has pivoted from unpopular moves before, but a recent decision about military leadership and strategy could weaken his position. See more of our coverage in your search results. Encuentra más de nuestra cobertura en los resultados de búsqueda. Add The New York Times on Google Agrega The New York Times en Google Before he became president, Volodymyr Zelensky played Napoleon in a comedic film that portrayed his character as a headstrong idiot who refused to change course even as he led his army to ruin. As president, Mr. Zelensky has been the opposite of his depiction of the French general — being, perhaps, flexible to a fault.

stories.title: Closed Roads Leave Kosovo-Montenegro Mountain Region Cut Off
stories.summary: Roads in the Accursed Mountains between Kosovo and Montenegro remain closed, leaving residents like Mehdi Berisha cut off from their land. Berisha, who owns 23 hectares in the Bjehulle region, must navigate complex border issues to reach his property, a situation stemming from the 1999 closure of the old road due to smuggling concerns. As both countries have yet to finalize their border demarcation, the disruption continues to impact local communities.

stories.title: US-Repräsentantenhaus billigt mehr als eine Billion Dollar fürs Pentagon
stories.summary: Das US-Repräsentantenhaus hat für eine deutliche Erhöhung des Verteidigungshaushalts gestimmt. Das Ergebnis fiel knapp aus - auch von Trumps Republikanern gab es Nein-Stimmen. Der Etat für 2027 muss noch durch die zweite Parlamentskammer. Das US-Repräsentantenhaus hat die Voraussetzungen für drastisch steigende Militärausgaben geschaffen - während der Iran-Krieg unvermindert weitergeht. Die Parlamentskammer verabschiedete den National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) - ein Rahmenkonzept für die Verteidigungspolitik im Haushaltsjahr 2027.

stories.title: Amazon’s best 4K streaming sticks are up to 40 percent off
stories.summary: There’s no shortage of great shows and movies to watch, but discovering something new isn’t always easy. Amazon’s Fire TV Stick 4K Plus and Fire TV Stick 4K Max come with redesigned software that aims to make it easier to finding something you’ll like, and both 4K-ready streaming sticks are back to their lowest prices to date. The Fire TV Stick 4K Max, Amazon’s fastest, most feature-packed stick, is $34.99 ($25 off) at Best Buy and Target, while the Fire TV Stick 4K Plus with fewer capabilities is on sale for $24.99 ($25 off) at Best Buy and Target.

stories.title: Audiences : échec pour le retour de «L’Agence, nouvelles destinations» sur TMC
stories.summary: Mercredi soir, TF1 est arrivée en tête des audiences Un Indien dans la ville . La rediffusion de la comédie portée par Thierry Lhermitte, Patrick Timsit et Ludwig Briand a attiré 2,5 millions de téléspectateurs, soit 18,4 % de part d’audience. Non loin derrière, France 2 rediffusait Tout cela je te le donnerai . Le premier épisode de la mini-série française avec David Kammenos, Bruno Solo, Aurélien Wiik et Louise Monot a réuni 2,4 millions de personnes, soit 16,3 % de PDA. France 3 suit avec «Secrets d’histoire». Le magazine présenté par Stéphane Bern et consacré à Arthur et aux chevaliers de la Table ronde a intéressé 1,3 million de téléspectateurs, soit 9,4 % du public.

stories.title: 'I am still alive': Indian activist on hunger strike for 26 days loses 11kg
stories.summary: Indian activist Sonam Wangchuk ended his 26-day hunger strike on Friday, losing 11 kilograms as protests over exam paper leaks rocked India. Prime Minister Narendra Modi responded Thursday by announcing fast-track courts for those responsible, calling student welfare a top priority. Demonstrators, however, insist deeper systemic reforms are needed to prevent future leaks.

stories.title: Olivia Rodrigo Teams With Etsy on Handmade Daisy Chain Fields Merch Collection Ahead of Inaugural Festival
stories.summary: Olivia Rodrigo has launched a handmade merchandise collection on Etsy for her inaugural Daisy Chains Music Festival, which starts today. The collection features items from ten female-owned shops, including flower crowns, temporary tattoos, and custom playing cards, with prices ranging from under $10 to $150. In addition to the online offerings, an Etsy Creative Village will be featured at the festival, enhancing the event's community spirit.

stories.title: Weekend weather set to change following warm spell
stories.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 16:27 Getty Saturday and Sunday will see 'unsettled' conditions develop across the country The weather is set to take a change this coming weekend following the recent warm spell, Met Éireann has said. Meteorologist Aoife Kealy said the rest of the working week will stay mostly dry, with decent bright spells, however, Saturday and Sunday will see more unsettled conditions develop across the country. "The high pressure that's been bringing the settled spell is gradually going to slip away from us," Ms Kealy said.

stories.title: Burnham pauses early prison release scheme
stories.summary: The government has paused a plan to release prisoners early after serving half their sentences. The scheme would have applied to those serving two-thirds of fixed terms, including two killers of PC Andrew Harper due in June 2027. Victims' families and opposition parties had strongly criticised the policy over concerns about justice and public safety.

stories.title: Hosepipe ban in force as drought threatens - is your area affected?
stories.summary: A hosepipe ban is now in force for more than 20 million people across England and Wales as drought conditions grip North Wales and the Upper Severn river basin. July is on track to be the driest in Wales since records began 190 years ago, with Natural Resources Wales warning supplies remain under severe strain. Water companies urge households to cut usage immediately as the hot, dry spell shows no sign of easing.

stories.title: The only way to stop petrol pump thieves | Brief letters
stories.summary: Petrol pump thefts are surging in the UK, with thieves siphoning fuel while drivers leave engines running. Police report a 40% rise in incidents this year alone. The Home Office now urges drivers to lock their cars and pay at the pump before filling up.

stories.title: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
stories.summary: Oil prices surged to $100 a barrel for the first time since May amid rising Middle East tensions. The spike follows Houthi attacks on Red Sea oil tankers and US military strikes against Iran. Analysts warn the conflict could further boost global inflation and fuel costs.

stories.title: Preview: Alashkert FC vs CFR Cluj - prediction, team news, lineups
stories.summary: Alashkert FC and CFR Cluj square off in the first leg of the Conference League second qualifying round on Thursday. While Armenian side Alashkert came through a hard-fought tie earlier this month, their Romanian opponents join the competition at this stage. Match preview Having finished down in fourth place in last season's Armenian top flight, Alashkert face an uphill battle to qualify for the main stage of a European competition for just the second time. Their only other appearance came back in 2021-22, when they collected just one point from a Conference League group that featured LASK Linz, Maccabi Tel Aviv and HJK.

stories.title: Mercato : l’énorme coup de pression du clan Yan Diomandé au PSG
stories.summary: Paris à tout prix. Cet été, Yan Diomandé est un homme très courtisé. Auteur de 13 buts et 10 assists en 36 matches toutes compétitions confondues la saison dernière avec le RB Leipzig, l’Ivoirien a tapé dans l’œil de nombreux clubs. Ce jeudi, Bild rappelle la liste des écuries séduites par son profil, ses qualités et son potentiel, puisqu’il n’a que 19 ans. Ainsi, Liverpool, Arsenal, le Real Madrid, Manchester City et le Paris Saint-Germain sont tous candidats à sa signature. Mais c’est le club français qui est en pole sur ce dossier.Diomandé veut le PSGEn effet, le PSG, très confiant selon nos informations, a la préférence du natif d’Abidjan.

stories.title: Football clubs urged to ease police cost burden on taxpayers
stories.summary: Football clubs in England and Wales are being urged to cover more policing costs outside stadiums after incidents at matches hit a record 1,644 last season. Chief Constable Mark Roberts says taxpayers paid £70m for football policing in 2023-24 as clubs currently bear no costs beyond their grounds. The UK’s football policing lead warns the current system “simply cannot continue” as high-severity incidents rose to 159.

stories.title: Denzel Washington: “First part of your life, you learn. Second part of your life, you earn. Third part of your
stories.summary: Denzel Washington is one of those rare Hollywood figures whose influence extends far beyond the screen. Renowned not only for his extraordinary acting ability but also for his outlook on life, he regularly shares memorable reflections and thought-provoking quotes whenever he speaks publicly. The two-time Oscar winner, whose career includes acclaimed films such as Cry Freedom, Glory, Malcolm X, The Hurricane, Training Day, Fences and Gladiator II, often draws on his own experiences during interviews. One of the ideas he returns to most is a simple but powerful observation: “The first part of your life, you learn. The second, you earn.

stories.title: The new Halo remake is a reminder of what Xbox used to be
stories.summary: Microsoft’s Halo: Campaign Evolved remake revives the 2001 classic with modern graphics and gameplay. The full campaign retelling drops on November 8 for Xbox Series X|S and PC. It’s a throwback to Xbox’s early success, built on Halo’s iconic story and action.

stories.title: Crews Move Artemis IV Liquid Hydrogen Tank
stories.summary: Crews at NASA’s Michoud Assembly Facility in New Orleans moved the 130-foot Artemis IV liquid hydrogen tank on May 15, 2026. The tank will power the SLS rocket’s core stage, feeding super-cold propellant to four RS-25 engines. Next, it heads to a detached test building for final checks before integration.

stories.title: High Court leaves rugby brain injury case in balance
stories.summary: A High Court judge has reserved judgment on whether hundreds of rugby players suing over brain injuries complied with orders to disclose neurological testing documents. The cases, involving 337 union and 153 league players, hinge on whether governing bodies World Rugby, WRU, RFU and RFL breached duty of care. A decision on striking out claims is pending, with no timeline given.

stories.title: FPL is live: Pick your 2026/27 squad NOW
stories.summary: Fantasy Premier League is LIVE, with managers now able to see how much every single player will cost and create their squad for the 2026/27 season. Pick your squad NOW For FPL managers who are returning to Fantasy Premier League , there is now be an option to get help when picking your initial squad through the website. While experienced managers can choose to skip this process and select their squad as normal, less-experienced managers and beginners can answer a few quick questions that will shape a squad that is chosen for them, based on their preferences. For more information, click below, and you can also watch our "ULTIMATE Beginner’s Guide to FPL" to help you get started.

stories.title: Vincenzo Italiano: "Çok kaliteli bir oyuncu, beni şaşırttı"
stories.summary: Beşiktaş Teknik Direktörü Vincenzo Italiano, UEFA Avrupa Ligi 'nde Midtjylland ile oynayacakları karşılaşma öncesinde takımın hazır olduğunu belirterek, sahaya Beşiktaş kimliğini yansıtan bir ekip çıkarmayı hedeflediklerini söyledi. Siyah-beyazlı ekibin Midtjylland maçı öncesinde düzenlenen basın toplantısında açıklamalarda bulunan İtalyan teknik adam, sezon öncesi kampının milli takımlarda bulunan oyuncular nedeniyle eksik kadroyla başladığını ifade etti. "Keşke ilk günden itibaren tam kadro çalışabilseydik" Hazırlık sürecinde genç futbolcularla çalıştıklarını aktaran Italiano, "Sezon öncesi kampına çok sayıda genç oyuncuyla başladık. Milli takım süreci nedeniyle bazı oyuncular geç katıldı.

stories.title: Mapa de incendios de España en directo: consulta los focos activos de tu localidad
stories.summary: Los servicios de emergencia continúan desplegados en distintos puntos de España para hacer frente a una de las campañas de más complicadas de los últimos años. Aunque el incendio de La Mierla (Guadalajara) evoluciona favorablemente, otros focos activos en Castilla y León, Aragón, Castilla-La Mancha y Cataluña mantienen movilizados a cientos de efectivos, en un contexto marcado por las altas temperaturas, el viento y el elevado riesgo de nuevos incendios y reactivaciones. La magnitud de la campaña también se refleja en el balance nacional.

stories.title: Oil-Rich Saudi Arabia Isn’t Short on Energy. Here’s Why It Wants to Go Nuclear.
stories.summary: Opponents warn that a U.S.-Saudi deal could be a step toward the kingdom building an atomic bomb. But the world’s largest exporter of crude oil has other motives for diversifying its energy mix.

stories.title: AI arms race in line for a reckoning after OpenAI hacking incident
stories.summary: OpenAI is facing scrutiny after a recent hacking incident raised alarms about the potential for AI systems to act maliciously. This follows a similar event with Anthropic's Mythos model, prompting global concerns over AI-led cyber threats. In response, experts are calling for regulatory measures, and OpenAI's CEO, Sam Altman, is set to brief White House officials next week on the implications for AI safety and security.

stories.title: House Again Rebukes Trump on Iran War Powers Vote
stories.summary: For the second time, a few Republicans joined Democrats to back a measure calling on the president to seek authorization for the conflict.

stories.title: A Russian Spy, Suddenly Cast Into the Spotlight, Flees Japan
stories.summary: The military intelligence officer left the country after The Times reported that he was using the Aeroflot airline office in Tokyo to conduct espionage.

stories.title: Lawsuit Against Meta Over Social Media Addiction Is Dropped
stories.summary: For Meta, the move was a reprieve after it and YouTube were found liable in another case in March of negligence and personal injury for their platforms’ addictive features.

stories.title: Nuclear Energy Revival Puts Westinghouse in Prime Position
stories.summary: The company, which filed for bankruptcy protection in 2017, stands to benefit from growing support for nuclear power and President Trump’s deal with Saudi Arabia.

stories.title: Risk of Parkinson’s disease may increase with prolonged exposure to road traffic noise
stories.summary: A new study in JAMA Neurology links long-term road traffic noise to a higher Parkinson’s risk. Researchers tracked 3.1 million Danes over 18 years, finding a 3% rise in risk for every 11.5-decibel increase at home. Quiet home areas may help offset the effect.

stories.title: Poorest children in England 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections
stories.summary: Children living in the poorest areas across England are 40% more likely to be admitted to hospital for respiratory infections, an analysis of NHS England data shows, with experts raising the alarm on the impact of air pollution on young people’s health. The analysis, based on data obtained via freedom of information requests by the charity Impact on Urban Health, revealed 1,941 out of every 100,000 children living in the most deprived fifth of England were admitted to hospital for respiratory illnesses in 2024-25.

stories.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
stories.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

offbeat.title: Tour: Carapaz belohnt sich mit Sieg bei Bergankunft in Orcières-Merlette
offbeat.summary: Richard Carapaz hat die zweite Bergankunft der Tour de France in den Alpen gewonnen. Der Ecuadorianer belohnte sich damit in Orcières-Merlette für seine vielen Attacken. Unzählige Male war der 33-Jährige bei dieser Tour in die Offensive gegangen, auch die 18. Etappe prägte er von Anfang an mit. Von Ralf Schloßmacher Auf dem sieben Kilometer langen Schlussanstieg hatte Carapaz die erste Attacke aus einer sechsköpfigen Ausreißergruppe gesetzt. Erst im zweiten Versuch 3,4 Kilometer vor dem Ziel konnte er sich dann absetzen und feierte als Solist nach 2024 seinen zweiten Etappensieg bei der Tour. 45 Sekunden dahinter kamen Mauro Schmid als Zweiter und Matteo Jorgenson als Dritter ins Ziel.

offbeat.title: LIVE Tour de France, la 18ª tappa: Caruso e Frigo nel gruppo in fuga. Pogacar con 4'45" di ritardo
offbeat.summary: Carapaz vince la tappa con un grande strappo nel finale. Gruppetto staccato di oltre 40", il gruppo con i migliori accusa un ritardo di 4'36" A 3 km dal traguardo, Carapaz stacca i compagni di fuga di 16", in aumento. Potrebbe aver dato lo scrollone decisivo Inizia la salita finale di Orcières-Merlette. Pogacar e gli altri big a 5'45" dai primi. Out McNulty A 13 km dall'arrivo, sei in testa. Maglia gialla a 6'20". Si ritira McNulty, gregario importante per Pogacar. Tra 2 km inizia la salita finale Jorgenson, Carapaz, Paret-Peintre, Schmid, Johannessen e Garcia Pierna compongono la testa della corsa.

offbeat.title: Kijk hier live naar de ontknoping van de 18e etappe in de Tour de France
offbeat.summary: NOS Wielrennen vandaag, 12:20 Kijk hier live naar de achttiende etappe van de Tour de France. Een bergrit over 185 km van Voiron naar Orcières-Merlette. Het commentaar is van Andries Lamain en Michael Boogerd. Beklimmingen - afstand tot aan de finish 149 km Côte d'Engins - 1ste cat. 11,4 km à 5,4% 93 km Côte de Monteynard - 2de cat. 9,7 km à 5,0% 72 km Côte des Terrasses - 3de cat. 3,4 km à 6,6% 56 km Corps - sprint 19 km Côte de Saint-Léger-les-Mélezes - 3de cat. 2,5 km à 6,9% 0 km Orcieres-Merlette - 1ste cat. 7,1 km à 6,7% Beluister dagelijks de NOS Wielerpodcast (opent in nieuw venster) . Stef Clement en Andries Lamain praten je in twintig minuten bij over de etappe van vandaag en morgen.

offbeat.title: ESPN cuts ties with NFL analyst Ryan Clark, wider layoffs expected Tuesday: Sources - The Athletic
offbeat.summary: ESPN has cut ties with NFL analyst Ryan Clark, sources briefed on the move told The Athletic . Clark was on ESPN’s “NFL Live” on Monday. He was informed of the decision during the show, said the sources, speaking on the condition of anonymity to discuss a sensitive matter. Clark did not finish the program. Sources at ESPN say the reason they told Clark during the show was due to media inquiries into his departure and a fear that the news would leak out before they could inform him. Since after the Super Bowl in February, sources had told The Athletic that Clark’s job could be in jeopardy. Last week, The Athletic learned that Clark was likely to be let go.

offbeat.title: Nuove banconote in euro, la Bce svela i primi disegni: da Leonardo a Maria Callas, ecco come cambierà il contante
offbeat.summary: Per la prima volta dalla nascita dell'euro, i cittadini europei possono scegliere il volto delle future banconote. La Banca centrale europea ha presentato oggi i 10 progetti finalisti della nuova serie dell'euro e ha aperto una consultazione pubblica (qui votare) che resterà aperta fino al 21 settembre. Saranno i cittadini, insieme agli esperti e al Consiglio direttivo della Bce, a contribuire alla scelta della nuova veste grafica della moneta unica, la prima completamente ridisegnata qdalla sua introduzione nel 2002. «Le banconote in euro sono più di un mezzo di pagamento: sono una delle espressioni più tangibili dell'Europa.

offbeat.title: Tour de France 2026: les regrets de Lavenu pour Paul Seixas après son éviction jugée "violente, improbable, injuste" de Decathlon-CMA CGM
offbeat.summary: Brillant pour son premier Tour de France à seulement 19 ans, Paul Seixas reste en lice pour décrocher un fantastique podium sur l’édition 2026 de la Grande Boucle. À seulement 20 secondes d’Isaac Del Toro, le leader de l’équipe Decathlon-CMA CGM possède un vrai coup à jouer sur les dernières étapes de la course. Ancien patron emblématique de la formation tricolore, Vincent Lavenu s’est enthousiasmé pour les débuts du coureur qu’il a déniché chez les jeunes. "Aujourd’hui, il est quatrième à 20 secondes du podium de Del Toro.

offbeat.title: Ibai Llanos: "La Velada que me queda por hacer es en Bilbao saliendo yo a boxear delante de mi familia"
offbeat.summary: This Saturday, July 25, the sixth edition of Ibai Llanos' Velada del Año will take place at the Estadio La Cartuja in Sevilla, featuring boxing, music, and digital entertainment. With temperatures expected to drop to around 33 degrees Celsius, thousands are anticipated to attend the event, which begins at 7 PM. Following this edition, Llanos expressed his desire to host a future event in Bilbao, where he hopes to box in front of his family.

offbeat.title: Direct vidéo - Tour de France 2026, 18e étape : 6 hommes en tête dont Jorgenson, Johannessen et Carapaz
offbeat.summary: Dans quel état d’esprit les coureurs du classement général aborderont-ils cette 18e étape ? Il est évident qu’ils ne pourront pas se cacher dans l’ascension finale vers Orcières-Merlette. Mais avant deux terribles étapes, avec une double arrivée à l’Alpe d’Huez, oseront-ils jeter toutes leurs forces dans la bataille ce jeudi ? Réponse dès 12h avec notre émission d’avant Tour, avant le début du direct de l’étape dès 12h50.

offbeat.title: Gary Lineker among millionaires asking Andy Burnham to tax them more
offbeat.summary: Millionaires including former footballer Gary Lineker and music producer Brian Eno have written to new prime minister Andy Burnham asking to be taxed more. In an open letter, 120 well-off Britons told Burnham: "We can afford it. We're not talking about higher taxes on those who get up and go to work for their income every day, but on the very richest whose income is derived from the wealth they hold." Organised by Patriotic Millionaires, the letter said it would lead to a more equal society, and urged a "devolution of wealth and power from the very richest". People can already give money or stocks voluntarily to the Treasury using a donation facility.

offbeat.title: Vasto, incidente mortale sulla Statale 16
offbeat.summary: Condividi Un morto ed un ferito. E’ questo il grave bilancio dell’incidente stradale che si è verificato nel pomeriggio di oggi, giovedì 23 luglio, sulla Statale 16, subito dopo l’uscita di Via Del Porto. Tremendo l’impatto che ha coinvolto un camion ed una Peugeot 3008. Al momento non si conoscono le cause. Sul posto i sanitari del 118, i vigili del fuoco di Vasto e le forze dell’ordine. Al momento la strada è chiusa al traffico in entrambe le direzioni. Illeso il conducente del camion. Non andata così, invece, alle due persone che erano in auto. Una è morta, l’altra è gravemente ferita.

offbeat.title: Un nouveau cas rare de cancer se transmet comme un parasite chez des poissons d’eau douce
offbeat.summary: Un cancer contagieux rare a été découvert chez des poissons-chats dans le lac Memphrémagog, à la frontière entre les États-Unis et le Québec. La maladie, identifiée en 2012, touche environ un tiers des barbottes brunes et se transmet directement entre individus. Les scientifiques étudient désormais son impact sur les populations pour évaluer les risques écologiques.

offbeat.title: Berlin: CSD in Berlin mit Auftritten von Ikkimel und Sarah Connor
offbeat.summary: Beim Berliner Christopher Street Days (CSD) treten zwei prominente Sängerinnen auf. Wie die CSD-Veranstalter am Donnerstag bekannt machten, wird für Freitag Ikkimel erwartet, für Samstag Sarah Connor. Ikkimel sei "mit ihren Songs, ihrer Haltung und ihrer Stimme (...) aus der queeren Szene nicht mehr wegzudenken", hieß es in einem Instagram-Post des CSD. "Wir freuen uns riesig, dass sie uns beim Demokratieabend am Brandenburger Tor unterstützt." Der genaue Auftrittszeitpunkt wurde nicht mitgeteilt. Bei der Abschlusskundgebung des CSD tritt zudem am Samstag Sängerin Sarah Connor auf.

offbeat.title: Tour de France 2026 stage 18 predictions, tips and odds: Richard Carapaz can claim glory on first Alpine stage
offbeat.summary: Click here to add us to your Google preferred sources or find out more here Three big days in the Alps start here with a summit finish at Orcieres-Merlette at the end of a 185.2km route that shouldn't be as taxing as the roads to Alpe d'Huez on Friday and Saturday. Tadej Pogacar has a lead of 4min 32sec over Remco Evenepoel and, barring disaster, is poised to join the select group of five-time Tour winners and eat further into Mark Cavendish's record of stage wins. The route kicks up early with the category one Cote d'Engins and a breakaway of around 20 riders is likely to build a good lead as the stage progresses over three more lower-category climbs before the 7.1km ascent to the finish.

offbeat.title: 26_0558 La Ertzaintza detiene en Mungia a tres hombres que acababan de robar en una vivienda de Bakio
offbeat.summary: 26_0558 La Ertzaintza detiene en Mungia a tres hombres que acababan de robar en una vivienda de Bakio Servicio de prensa 22-07-2026 Agentes de la Ertzaintza detuvieron el lunes en Mungia a tres ladrones en posesión de joyas, que acababan de robar en un domicilio del municipio de Bakio. Los arrestados tienen antecedentes policiales por este tipo de delitos y la autoridad judicial ha decretado su ingreso en prisión. Fotos Patrullas de la Ertzain-etxea de Gernika interceptaron el lunes un vehículo de alta gama, sobre las 19:00 horas, en un control preventivo que realizaban en la carretera BI-2120, en el término municipal de Mungia.

offbeat.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved im Test: Benchmarks, DLSS/FSR-Analysen, Latenz-Messungen + mehr
offbeat.summary: Wie gut ist die Technik der PC-Version von Halo: Campaign Evolved? Der Test mit Benchmarks sowie Analysen zu DLSS, FSR und Raytracing verrät es. Im Fokus: Grafikkarten-Benchmarks mit Nvidia GeForce, AMD Radeon und Intel Arc. Zudem wird das Upsampling in Form von DLSS und FSR genauer analysiert. Latenzmessungen gibt es ebenfalls. Halo: Campaign Evolved: Die Technik der PC-Version Microsofts beliebte Ego-Shooter-Serie Halo ist erstmals 2001 erschienen. Halo war das Zugpferd der damals ersten Xbox. Genau 25 Jahre später folgt unter dem Namen „Halo: Campaign Evolved“ das Remake des ersten Teils.

offbeat.title: Test de Halo Campaign Evolved : le remake inutile d’un chef-d’œuvre intemporel
offbeat.summary: Un retour aux sources pour impulser la «réinitialisation» de la marque Xbox. Moins d’un mois après l’annonce de licenciements massifs au sein de ses studios de jeux vidéo, Microsoft commercialise à partir du 28 juillet (ou de ce 23 juillet pour les acheteurs de l’édition premium) Halo Campaign Evolved, réédition attendue de son jeu de tir culte Halo Combat Evolved, sorti en 2001 et déjà remastérisé en 2011. Avec ce remake, Xbox compte bien relancer sa saga légendaire (plus de 80 millions d’unités vendues sur 12 épisodes) et faire oublier son dernier opus, le décrié Halo Infinite (2021). Pas sûr toutefois que Xbox s’en sorte avec les honneurs en termes de contenu et de prix.

offbeat.title: Un feu brûle 8 000 m2 de végétation dans la nuit à Entraigues-sur-la-Sorgue
offbeat.summary: Un incendie a ravagé 8 000 mètres carrés de végétation à Entraigues-sur-la-Sorgue dans la nuit du 21 juillet, sans faire de blessés ni de dégâts matériels. Environ 27 pompiers ont combattu le feu, qui a été alimenté par un vent modéré, et les efforts se sont poursuivis jusqu'à ce qu'il soit maîtrisé. Les autorités continuent de surveiller la situation pour prévenir tout risque de reprise.

offbeat.title: Quel depistaggio di Ranucci: indicò la Colosimo al pm
offbeat.summary: Cosa c’entra Chiara Colosimo, la presidente della Commissione bicamerale antimafia, con l’attentato subito da Sigfrido Ranucci nell’ottobre dello scorso anno? Si potrebbe pensare all’audizione del conduttore nella commissione che lei presiede. E invece no, perché Mr Report ha fatto il nome della Colosimo in un’occasione delicatissima: il 17 ottobre 2025, esattamente il giorno dopo l’azione dinamitarda che lo vedeva bersaglio. Erano le ore 15,24 quando, presso gli uffici della procura della Repubblica di Roma, Ranucci sedeva dinanzi al Procuratore Francesco Lo Voi e al pubblico ministero, titolare dell’indagine, Carlo Villani, oggi procuratore a Velletri.

offbeat.title: Commonwealth Games: Katerina Johnson-Thompson out injured - why do athletes keep withdrawing?
offbeat.summary: Olympic heptathlon champion Katarina Johnson-Thompson has pulled out of the Commonwealth Games in Glasgow due to injury. England’s relay teams have also been reshuffled with Dina Asher-Smith, Matt Hudson-Smith and Daryll Neita replaced. The track and field events start Monday as England adds four more athletes to its squad.

offbeat.title: More than 80,700 sign petition calling for World Cup final replay
offbeat.summary: Argentina's defeat to Spain in the 2026 World Cup final, played on Sunday 19 July at New Jersey's MetLife Stadium, has sparked a wave of protests that continues several days after the final whistle.Fan Gisela Sánchez launched a petition on Change.org calling on FIFA to replay the match, which was decided by a Ferran Torres goal in extra time.

offbeat.title: Wildfires and record dry conditions triggers drought in parts of Wales
offbeat.summary: Gail Davies-Walsh, chief executive of Afonydd Cymru, said the country's waterways were already under strain due to pollution. "The lack of rainfall and decline in river flows is really starting to exacerbate water quality," she said. "We've already had a couple of rivers that have dried up and we're getting reports through of fish that have been killed because of a lack of water." High river temperatures were also leading to concerns for the survival of aquatic life, she added, with water temperatures as high as 28C recorded in the Wye and Usk.

offbeat.title: Peter Phillips and Harriet Sperling are joined by her teenage daughter, Georgina, to support Prince William at a charity polo day
offbeat.summary: From their first meeting to their wedding day, family has been at the heart of Peter Phillips and Harriet Sperling's royal romance. So it is of no surprise their three daughters continue to play such an important part in their lives now that they're married. Last week, Harriet and Peter were joined by her daughter, Georgina, as they made a low-key appearance at the DMMI Royal Charity Polo Cup at Guards Polo Club, Windsor.

offbeat.title: Closed Roads Leave Kosovo-Montenegro Mountain Region Cut Off
offbeat.summary: Roads in the Accursed Mountains between Kosovo and Montenegro remain closed, leaving residents like Mehdi Berisha cut off from their land. Berisha, who owns 23 hectares in the Bjehulle region, must navigate complex border issues to reach his property, a situation stemming from the 1999 closure of the old road due to smuggling concerns. As both countries have yet to finalize their border demarcation, the disruption continues to impact local communities.

offbeat.title: US-Repräsentantenhaus billigt mehr als eine Billion Dollar fürs Pentagon
offbeat.summary: Das US-Repräsentantenhaus hat für eine deutliche Erhöhung des Verteidigungshaushalts gestimmt. Das Ergebnis fiel knapp aus - auch von Trumps Republikanern gab es Nein-Stimmen. Der Etat für 2027 muss noch durch die zweite Parlamentskammer. Das US-Repräsentantenhaus hat die Voraussetzungen für drastisch steigende Militärausgaben geschaffen - während der Iran-Krieg unvermindert weitergeht. Die Parlamentskammer verabschiedete den National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) - ein Rahmenkonzept für die Verteidigungspolitik im Haushaltsjahr 2027.

offbeat.title: Audiences : échec pour le retour de «L’Agence, nouvelles destinations» sur TMC
offbeat.summary: Mercredi soir, TF1 est arrivée en tête des audiences Un Indien dans la ville . La rediffusion de la comédie portée par Thierry Lhermitte, Patrick Timsit et Ludwig Briand a attiré 2,5 millions de téléspectateurs, soit 18,4 % de part d’audience. Non loin derrière, France 2 rediffusait Tout cela je te le donnerai . Le premier épisode de la mini-série française avec David Kammenos, Bruno Solo, Aurélien Wiik et Louise Monot a réuni 2,4 millions de personnes, soit 16,3 % de PDA. France 3 suit avec «Secrets d’histoire». Le magazine présenté par Stéphane Bern et consacré à Arthur et aux chevaliers de la Table ronde a intéressé 1,3 million de téléspectateurs, soit 9,4 % du public.

offbeat.title: 'I am still alive': Indian activist on hunger strike for 26 days loses 11kg
offbeat.summary: Indian activist Sonam Wangchuk ended his 26-day hunger strike on Friday, losing 11 kilograms as protests over exam paper leaks rocked India. Prime Minister Narendra Modi responded Thursday by announcing fast-track courts for those responsible, calling student welfare a top priority. Demonstrators, however, insist deeper systemic reforms are needed to prevent future leaks.

offbeat.title: Weekend weather set to change following warm spell
offbeat.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 16:27 Getty Saturday and Sunday will see 'unsettled' conditions develop across the country The weather is set to take a change this coming weekend following the recent warm spell, Met Éireann has said. Meteorologist Aoife Kealy said the rest of the working week will stay mostly dry, with decent bright spells, however, Saturday and Sunday will see more unsettled conditions develop across the country. "The high pressure that's been bringing the settled spell is gradually going to slip away from us," Ms Kealy said.

offbeat.title: Preview: Alashkert FC vs CFR Cluj - prediction, team news, lineups
offbeat.summary: Alashkert FC and CFR Cluj square off in the first leg of the Conference League second qualifying round on Thursday. While Armenian side Alashkert came through a hard-fought tie earlier this month, their Romanian opponents join the competition at this stage. Match preview Having finished down in fourth place in last season's Armenian top flight, Alashkert face an uphill battle to qualify for the main stage of a European competition for just the second time. Their only other appearance came back in 2021-22, when they collected just one point from a Conference League group that featured LASK Linz, Maccabi Tel Aviv and HJK.

offbeat.title: Mercato : l’énorme coup de pression du clan Yan Diomandé au PSG
offbeat.summary: Paris à tout prix. Cet été, Yan Diomandé est un homme très courtisé. Auteur de 13 buts et 10 assists en 36 matches toutes compétitions confondues la saison dernière avec le RB Leipzig, l’Ivoirien a tapé dans l’œil de nombreux clubs. Ce jeudi, Bild rappelle la liste des écuries séduites par son profil, ses qualités et son potentiel, puisqu’il n’a que 19 ans. Ainsi, Liverpool, Arsenal, le Real Madrid, Manchester City et le Paris Saint-Germain sont tous candidats à sa signature. Mais c’est le club français qui est en pole sur ce dossier.Diomandé veut le PSGEn effet, le PSG, très confiant selon nos informations, a la préférence du natif d’Abidjan.

offbeat.title: Denzel Washington: “First part of your life, you learn. Second part of your life, you earn. Third part of your
offbeat.summary: Denzel Washington is one of those rare Hollywood figures whose influence extends far beyond the screen. Renowned not only for his extraordinary acting ability but also for his outlook on life, he regularly shares memorable reflections and thought-provoking quotes whenever he speaks publicly. The two-time Oscar winner, whose career includes acclaimed films such as Cry Freedom, Glory, Malcolm X, The Hurricane, Training Day, Fences and Gladiator II, often draws on his own experiences during interviews. One of the ideas he returns to most is a simple but powerful observation: “The first part of your life, you learn. The second, you earn.

offbeat.title: FPL is live: Pick your 2026/27 squad NOW
offbeat.summary: Fantasy Premier League is LIVE, with managers now able to see how much every single player will cost and create their squad for the 2026/27 season. Pick your squad NOW For FPL managers who are returning to Fantasy Premier League , there is now be an option to get help when picking your initial squad through the website. While experienced managers can choose to skip this process and select their squad as normal, less-experienced managers and beginners can answer a few quick questions that will shape a squad that is chosen for them, based on their preferences. For more information, click below, and you can also watch our "ULTIMATE Beginner’s Guide to FPL" to help you get started.

offbeat.title: Vincenzo Italiano: "Çok kaliteli bir oyuncu, beni şaşırttı"
offbeat.summary: Beşiktaş Teknik Direktörü Vincenzo Italiano, UEFA Avrupa Ligi 'nde Midtjylland ile oynayacakları karşılaşma öncesinde takımın hazır olduğunu belirterek, sahaya Beşiktaş kimliğini yansıtan bir ekip çıkarmayı hedeflediklerini söyledi. Siyah-beyazlı ekibin Midtjylland maçı öncesinde düzenlenen basın toplantısında açıklamalarda bulunan İtalyan teknik adam, sezon öncesi kampının milli takımlarda bulunan oyuncular nedeniyle eksik kadroyla başladığını ifade etti. "Keşke ilk günden itibaren tam kadro çalışabilseydik" Hazırlık sürecinde genç futbolcularla çalıştıklarını aktaran Italiano, "Sezon öncesi kampına çok sayıda genç oyuncuyla başladık. Milli takım süreci nedeniyle bazı oyuncular geç katıldı.

offbeat.title: Mapa de incendios de España en directo: consulta los focos activos de tu localidad
offbeat.summary: Los servicios de emergencia continúan desplegados en distintos puntos de España para hacer frente a una de las campañas de más complicadas de los últimos años. Aunque el incendio de La Mierla (Guadalajara) evoluciona favorablemente, otros focos activos en Castilla y León, Aragón, Castilla-La Mancha y Cataluña mantienen movilizados a cientos de efectivos, en un contexto marcado por las altas temperaturas, el viento y el elevado riesgo de nuevos incendios y reactivaciones. La magnitud de la campaña también se refleja en el balance nacional.

offbeat.title: AI arms race in line for a reckoning after OpenAI hacking incident
offbeat.summary: OpenAI is facing scrutiny after a recent hacking incident raised alarms about the potential for AI systems to act maliciously. This follows a similar event with Anthropic's Mythos model, prompting global concerns over AI-led cyber threats. In response, experts are calling for regulatory measures, and OpenAI's CEO, Sam Altman, is set to brief White House officials next week on the implications for AI safety and security.

entertainment.title: The roaring 20s: how the current decade revolutionised cinema
entertainment.summary: Cinema in the 2020s has faced unprecedented challenges from streaming and the pandemic, yet it has also seen remarkable innovation. Filmmakers have embraced new technologies and collaborations with platforms like YouTube to create experiences impossible just a decade ago. The decade’s defining shift may be how cinema has evolved into an interactive dialogue with digital audiences.

entertainment.title: Olivia Rodrigo Teams With Etsy on Handmade Daisy Chain Fields Merch Collection Ahead of Inaugural Festival
entertainment.summary: Olivia Rodrigo has launched a handmade merchandise collection on Etsy for her inaugural Daisy Chains Music Festival, which starts today. The collection features items from ten female-owned shops, including flower crowns, temporary tattoos, and custom playing cards, with prices ranging from under $10 to $150. In addition to the online offerings, an Etsy Creative Village will be featured at the festival, enhancing the event's community spirit.

sports.title: Newcastle, Liverpool planning Keegan tribute at season opener
sports.summary: Newcastle United will honor Kevin Keegan with black armbands and a minute’s silence before their season-opening friendlies starting this Saturday. His number seven shirt will be celebrated in a tribute during matches on August 15 and 16. The club will also consult his family on a permanent memorial following his passing at age 72.

sports.title: Football clubs urged to ease police cost burden on taxpayers
sports.summary: Football clubs in England and Wales are being urged to cover more policing costs outside stadiums after incidents at matches hit a record 1,644 last season. Chief Constable Mark Roberts says taxpayers paid £70m for football policing in 2023-24 as clubs currently bear no costs beyond their grounds. The UK’s football policing lead warns the current system “simply cannot continue” as high-severity incidents rose to 159.

sports.title: High Court leaves rugby brain injury case in balance
sports.summary: A High Court judge has reserved judgment on whether hundreds of rugby players suing over brain injuries complied with orders to disclose neurological testing documents. The cases, involving 337 union and 153 league players, hinge on whether governing bodies World Rugby, WRU, RFU and RFL breached duty of care. A decision on striking out claims is pending, with no timeline given.

politics.title: Burnham says 20% business rates cut for English pubs 'a first step'
politics.summary: Andy Burnham announced a 20% cut to business rates for English pubs, social clubs and live music venues from April, saving firms around £1,100 each. The £100m plan, funded by reviewing tax relief on less community-focused businesses, will benefit nearly 32,000 venues. Details on eligibility and further support will be outlined at the Chancellor’s autumn Budget.

politics.title: Burnham pauses early prison release scheme
politics.summary: The government has paused a plan to release prisoners early after serving half their sentences. The scheme would have applied to those serving two-thirds of fixed terms, including two killers of PC Andrew Harper due in June 2027. Victims' families and opposition parties had strongly criticised the policy over concerns about justice and public safety.

politics.title: House Again Rebukes Trump on Iran War Powers Vote
politics.summary: For the second time, a few Republicans joined Democrats to back a measure calling on the president to seek authorization for the conflict.

breaking.title: Zelensky’s Dizzying U-Turn Is the Latest Zigzag in a Presidency Full of Them
breaking.summary: President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine has pivoted from unpopular moves before, but a recent decision about military leadership and strategy could weaken his position. See more of our coverage in your search results. Encuentra más de nuestra cobertura en los resultados de búsqueda. Add The New York Times on Google Agrega The New York Times en Google Before he became president, Volodymyr Zelensky played Napoleon in a comedic film that portrayed his character as a headstrong idiot who refused to change course even as he led his army to ruin. As president, Mr. Zelensky has been the opposite of his depiction of the French general — being, perhaps, flexible to a fault.

breaking.title: Oil-Rich Saudi Arabia Isn’t Short on Energy. Here’s Why It Wants to Go Nuclear.
breaking.summary: Opponents warn that a U.S.-Saudi deal could be a step toward the kingdom building an atomic bomb. But the world’s largest exporter of crude oil has other motives for diversifying its energy mix.

breaking.title: A Russian Spy, Suddenly Cast Into the Spotlight, Flees Japan
breaking.summary: The military intelligence officer left the country after The Times reported that he was using the Aeroflot airline office in Tokyo to conduct espionage.

tech.title: Amazon’s best 4K streaming sticks are up to 40 percent off
tech.summary: There’s no shortage of great shows and movies to watch, but discovering something new isn’t always easy. Amazon’s Fire TV Stick 4K Plus and Fire TV Stick 4K Max come with redesigned software that aims to make it easier to finding something you’ll like, and both 4K-ready streaming sticks are back to their lowest prices to date. The Fire TV Stick 4K Max, Amazon’s fastest, most feature-packed stick, is $34.99 ($25 off) at Best Buy and Target, while the Fire TV Stick 4K Plus with fewer capabilities is on sale for $24.99 ($25 off) at Best Buy and Target.

tech.title: The new Halo remake is a reminder of what Xbox used to be
tech.summary: Microsoft’s Halo: Campaign Evolved remake revives the 2001 classic with modern graphics and gameplay. The full campaign retelling drops on November 8 for Xbox Series X|S and PC. It’s a throwback to Xbox’s early success, built on Halo’s iconic story and action.

tech.title: Lawsuit Against Meta Over Social Media Addiction Is Dropped
tech.summary: For Meta, the move was a reprieve after it and YouTube were found liable in another case in March of negligence and personal injury for their platforms’ addictive features.

facts.title: Hosepipe ban in force as drought threatens - is your area affected?
facts.summary: A hosepipe ban is now in force for more than 20 million people across England and Wales as drought conditions grip North Wales and the Upper Severn river basin. July is on track to be the driest in Wales since records began 190 years ago, with Natural Resources Wales warning supplies remain under severe strain. Water companies urge households to cut usage immediately as the hot, dry spell shows no sign of easing.

facts.title: Crews Move Artemis IV Liquid Hydrogen Tank
facts.summary: Crews at NASA’s Michoud Assembly Facility in New Orleans moved the 130-foot Artemis IV liquid hydrogen tank on May 15, 2026. The tank will power the SLS rocket’s core stage, feeding super-cold propellant to four RS-25 engines. Next, it heads to a detached test building for final checks before integration.

facts.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
facts.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

health.title: The only way to stop petrol pump thieves | Brief letters
health.summary: Petrol pump thefts are surging in the UK, with thieves siphoning fuel while drivers leave engines running. Police report a 40% rise in incidents this year alone. The Home Office now urges drivers to lock their cars and pay at the pump before filling up.

health.title: Risk of Parkinson’s disease may increase with prolonged exposure to road traffic noise
health.summary: A new study in JAMA Neurology links long-term road traffic noise to a higher Parkinson’s risk. Researchers tracked 3.1 million Danes over 18 years, finding a 3% rise in risk for every 11.5-decibel increase at home. Quiet home areas may help offset the effect.

health.title: Poorest children in England 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections
health.summary: Children living in the poorest areas across England are 40% more likely to be admitted to hospital for respiratory infections, an analysis of NHS England data shows, with experts raising the alarm on the impact of air pollution on young people’s health. The analysis, based on data obtained via freedom of information requests by the charity Impact on Urban Health, revealed 1,941 out of every 100,000 children living in the most deprived fifth of England were admitted to hospital for respiratory illnesses in 2024-25.

crisis.title: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
crisis.summary: Oil prices surged to $100 a barrel for the first time since May amid rising Middle East tensions. The spike follows Houthi attacks on Red Sea oil tankers and US military strikes against Iran. Analysts warn the conflict could further boost global inflation and fuel costs.

crisis.title: Nuclear Energy Revival Puts Westinghouse in Prime Position
crisis.summary: The company, which filed for bankruptcy protection in 2017, stands to benefit from growing support for nuclear power and President Trump’s deal with Saudi Arabia.
